ETH ETFs 8-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
BTC ETFs 5-Day Inflow Streak Confirmed | YES | HIGH confidence**  
U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $238.37 million in net inflows on April 20, 2026, extending a 5 consecutive day streak—the firmest institutional buying since February—led by BlackRock’s IBIT at $256.05 million[1][3]. This follows prior strong days like $471 million on April 6, signaling sustained demand amid BTC trading near $78,50
